resources.string: The universal proxy toolchain for Android, written in Kotlin.
Custom theme requires Android 11 or newer.
Apply primary color to the app header
Apply primary color to the Stats Bar
Changes made in this session will be lost.
Buttons, active controls, tabs, and prominent accents.
Text and icons shown on primary-colored surfaces.
Selected navigation items, chips, and filled accent surfaces.
Text and icons on primary container surfaces.
Secondary accents and supporting Material controls.
Text and icons on secondary-colored surfaces.
Supporting filled surfaces such as selected chips.
Text and icons on secondary container surfaces.
Toolbars, app bars, cards, and grouped surfaces.
At least one group must remain.
Are you sure you want to remove this group?
Forward corresponding WebSockets through the browser.
If you don\'t want to use Quick Tile as the switch
Show the traffic speed without proxy in the notification as well
Disable certificate checking. When enabled, this configuration is as secure as plaintext
Resolve domains in bypass routes with Direct DNS. Be aware of potential DNS leaks
May cause other applications need to be restarted to reconnect to the network after proxy stopped
Hint system to treat VPN as metered
Are you sure you want to remove this route?
Not an asset file: excepted .db, but %s

Mux is designed to reduce TCP handshake latency, not to increase connection throughput. Using Mux to watch videos, download or speed test is usually counter productive. If the server does not support it, you will not be able to access the Internet.
TCP keep active packet delivery interval
Configure VPN mode for selected apps
Determines the route of unidentified TUN traffic. Keep on Block to prevent outbound IP leaks.
Specify a list of DNS servers requests to which will be routed regardless of the Android system traffic policy for TUN. Doesn\'t affect unknown traffic. Use only trusted servers.
Specify a list of DNS-over-TLS servers requests to which will be routed regardless of the Android system traffic policy for TUN. Doesn\'t affect unknown traffic. Use only trusted servers.
Specify a list of DNS-over-HTTPS servers requests to which will be routed regardless of the Android system traffic policy for TUN. Doesn\'t affect unknown traffic. Use only trusted servers.
Enable proxy on startup/app update if it was running before
Replaces the application title with the quick action toolbar
Shows a pill with profile count on each group tab
Your selected profile information will be less protected
Permission denied to create a VPN service
Failed to start VPN service. You might need to reboot your device.
ByeDPI can only appear as the first profile in a chain.
ByeDPI can only appear as the first profile in front proxy chains.
ByeDPI is not allowed as landing proxy.
ByeDPI is not allowed in proxy sets.
MasterDnsVPN is not allowed in proxy chains.
MasterDnsVPN is not allowed in proxy sets.
Amnezia API VPN keys are not supported. Import a self-hosted protocol configuration instead.
Your device lacks an Android standard file selector, please install one, such as Material Files.
Are you sure you want to remove this profile?
No proxies found in the link
No proxies found in the subscription
No proxies found in the file
No proxies found in the clipboard
No subscriptions found in the clipboard
No subscriptions found in the QR code
Warning: This plugin does not seem to come from a known trusted source.
This plugin might not work with Auto Connect
Changes not saved. Do you want to save?
This will route all your apps through proxy. Are you sure?
Reload proxy service to apply changes
Make sure you have read the documentation before adding custom rules, otherwise you may not be able to connect to the Internet.
Always display the server address on the configuration card
Enable local proxy in VPN mode
Opens a local SOCKS/HTTP proxy port alongside the TUN interface. Disabled by default to prevent VPN detection via open ports.
This can leak your proxy outbound IP. Use at your own risk.
HTTP proxy will be used directly from (browser/ some supported apps), without going through the virtual NIC device (Android 10+)
Are you sure you want to remove this group?
Resolve all domain names to IP addresses when updating. Host and SNI will be automatically appended if possible
Sends this device\'s unique identifier during subscription update. Enable only when subscription provider doesn\'t allow subscriptions without HWID.
Override auto-generated HWID with a fixed value. Leave empty to use the device-derived HWID.
Mimics another app\'s HWID logic. Use only if subscription provider restricts usage with a predefined apps list.
You\'ve reached maximum number of devices in this subscription
Profile %s requires the %s plugin to be installed, but it was not found.
Proxy is not connected, are you sure you want to continue updating?
The subscription requires support for protocol %s, but it cannot be found. Unsupported profiles will be ignored.
Subscription update timed out after %d seconds
Confirm you want to import subscription %s? If you are coming from an untrusted source, doing this may result in your IP and this behavior being leaked.
Confirm you want to import profile %s?
Confirm you want to import %d profiles?
Are you sure you want to clear this group?
Profile %s requires the %s plugin, but your proprietary equipment vendor (usually surveillance capital giants and malware maker) tampered with your Android, making the plugin unusable.
Routing rule %s relies on the VPN to be in effect, so it is ignored.
When disabled, the used traffic will not be counted
CloudFlare Warp is a free WireGuard VPN provider. By using it, you agree to the TOS.
Use the sniffed domain to overwrite the destination address, not just for routing
If the destination address is a domain, it is then passed out based on the IPv6 strategy (conflicts with FakeDNS)
Pcap files will be saved to %s

Use N concurrent tunnel connections to be more robust under bad network conditions. More connections make the tunneling easier to detect and less secure. This project strives for the strongest security against traffic analysis. Using it in an insecure way defeats its purpose. \n\nIf you must use this, try N=2 first to see if it solves your issues. Strongly recommend against using more than 4 connections here.
Determine the client\'s NAT mapping behaviour and the NAT filtering behaviour defined in RFC 3478 using STUN.
This may take a few minutes…
If the routing settings are not backed up with configurations, then custom outbounds will be lost.
Not an backup file: excepted .json, but %s
Importing will overwrite the existing data.
Hide the app from recent tasks when running in background
Your APP is too old (%s). And will stop working at %s. Please update!
Your APP is too old (%s). And has been stopped working at %s. Please update!
Perform sing-box panel cleanup?\nThis will stop the connection.
Provide Clash API and metacubexd dashboard
Resets the secret used to access the Clash API; use this if the old secret was compromised
Long press the preference to set custom MTU.
Long press the preference to set the buffer size.
Resolve the server address according to the IPv6 policy
Auto select proxy apps, this will clear your current selection.
Disable certificate checking when updating subscriptions
Connection will not fall back to HTTPS with this option enabled
Use Chrome network stack to make TrustTunnel less detectable
TLS record fragmentation and TCP segmentation
Authentication failed: Invalid username or password
Failed to create or access backup directory
Bypass all routing rules and proxy all traffic through current node
Reset outbound connections when network changes
Reconnect when device wake from sleep
Reset outbound connections when device wake from sleep
Time between updates of remote RuleSets. Examples: 1h, 30m, 3600s. Set to 0 to disable automatic updates
Ruleset format error: must start with rsip: or rssite:
Clear application cache files to fix some abnormal issues
Are you sure you want to clear the cache?
Enable concurrent connections for faster network establishment, may increase battery usage
This application is a preview version and may contain many problems. If you do not want to test it, please go to GitHub to download the Release version!
Current version: %1$s\nAvailable version: %2$s\nDo you want to download it?
Restore default settings, but data such as nodes and groups will be retained. To completely clear data, clear application data directly in the system settings.
Unable to read installed apps.\nThis is usually because the system has restricted app read permissions.\nPlease grant permissions in the system settings.
Geo files need to be updated
For the built-in routing rules to work, you need to download the routing databases.\n\nPlease click "Download" and then click the cloud icons ☁️ next to the geoip.db and geosite.db files.
Can drain battery on some devices (Realme / ColorOS)
Start by writing rsip: or rssite:
NekoBox+ can\'t enable Wi-Fi rules, no geolocation access
NekoBox+ couldn\'t read Wi-Fi network, enable geolocation
Wi-Fi SSID and BSSID rules need background location access to work while NekoBox+ is not open. In Android settings, choose “%s”.
System DNS traffic route for TUN
Determines the route for TUN traffic to the DNS, DoT, and DoH whitelist. Keep on the first mode to prevent outbound IP leaks.
Configures update interval for the profile traffic. Can show incorrect values when notification updates and Wake Lock are disabled.
You can use SlipNet Lite to find working servers
Persist local DNS cache to file
Local DNS cache flush interval seconds
SOCKS UDP associate read timeout seconds
Session init busy retry interval seconds
ARQ data NACK initial delay seconds
ARQ terminal ACK wait timeout seconds
Makes Clash API & sing-box invisible to the other apps
Enables the single-box profiler. This is a developer-only option and may increase power consumption & will heavily increase cache usage.
Implicitly calls runtime garbage collector on a running libcore
No profiler snapshot has been collected yet
